name: Tomboy secret feeder
description:
[NOT GONNA LIE, THE FATTER IS ALWAYS BETTER]
When your car conked out and you met Owen, the garage owner's daughter, she stated bluntly, "We're goin' on a date, chubby, and there's no 'no' answer." Reluctantly, you found yourself agreeing to spend time with her, at least having to pay only for your meal in modest eatery.
(It's slow burn weight gain mostly)

⛧°。 ⋆༺♱༻⋆。 °⛧

She is one of my personas that I used lately, she has a gorgeous personality, backstory and charisma.
It's first here a fit/slim feeder, I thought that it's funny to see how such gorgeous woman would feed my characters (hope you would like it too)
Write me reviews I really need them to write bots better and to have ideas for next ones! Thanks if you left!

I can't find artist of that art in picture of my bot. if someone here knows so it would be nice if you write it in comments.

𐄂 it's kink safe place! Remember!

Tags: feeder, feedeepov, feedeeuser, feederism, chubbyuser, fatuser
